ground_truth.title: Anti-Money Laundering Compliance Using Network Analysis and NLP
ground_truth.abstract: We combine transaction graph analysis with NLP processing of SWIFT message narratives to identify money laundering typologies, reducing false positive rates by 60% compared to rule-based systems.
